content: envoyer un seul input a spliter plutôt que 5

General
* The task currently lacks any key programming elements such as lists, sets, dictionaries, string manipulation, loops, conditions… Please include one or more programming elements so that the task is a programming one rather than a purely maths one.

Constraints
* Please remove the third "constraint", which isn't really a constraint, and it isn't necessary to specify it as a rule because the calculation method doesn't change when T = 0.

Cases
* Please use the entire range of possible values (0 to 1000) as inputs. Currently there are too many 1-digit integers, and too few 2-digit and 3-digit integers.

Thanks.
Maybe you could try reverse-calculating this, maybe you have the amounts and you need to find all possible inputs and print the number.
